commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 03 Jul

NYSE dominates liquidity across all metrics, with an exceptional ILLIQ score of 0.0016—nearly 11 times tighter than Euronext—and the narrowest Roll spread at 1.02%. Conversely, the London Stock Exchange ranks last with significantly elevated price impact (ILLIQ=0.1357) and widest AR spread (0.8175%), suggesting material trading friction. Notably, Nasdaq 100 exhibits anomalously high Roll spread (1.72%) despite favorable ILLIQ, indicating potential microstructure inefficiencies worth monitoring.
